name: Streusel Caramel Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
Unwrap caramels and warm them in the oven for five minutes on a plate.
From the batter ingredients: Beat together the sugar, butter, and egg. Stir in the milk.
Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together. Blend with the egg mixture.
Spread 2/3 of the batter in prepared pan.
Pull one caramel at a time and press it into the batter, arranging them regularly.
Spread remaining batter over top.
Mix together streusel ingredients and sprinkle over batter.
Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until a pick comes out clean. Cut and serve warm.
